assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing trustify-backend entry in the Repository Registry unchanged (same Role, Serena Instance, Path values as in claude-md-configured.md)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 16: '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |' — matches the original entry exactly (Role: Rust backend service, Serena Instance: serena_backend, Path: /home/user/trustify-backend).

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md adds a new trustify-ui entry to the Repository Registry with serena_ui as the Serena Instance
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 17: '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |' — new row added with serena_ui as the Serena Instance.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves all existing Jira Configuration fields unchanged — Project key remains TC, Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID remain as in claude-md-configured.md
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 19-25 contain: Project key: TC, Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432, Feature issue type ID: 10142, Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875, GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747. All values match the original claude-md-configured.md.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md explicitly identifies which entries were preserved (existing) and which were added (new)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md has '## Added' section listing 'Added row: trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui' and '## Preserved (no changes)' section listing the existing trustify-backend row, all Jira Configuration fields, Code Intelligence content, and Bug Configuration fields.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md notes that serena_backend was already configured and serena_ui is newly discovered
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 31-32: '1. `serena_backend` — already in Repository Registry (skipped)' and '2. `serena_ui` — NOT in Repository Registry (new)'.

assertion_results.text: The existing Code Intelligence section content (naming convention, example, serena_backend limitations) is preserved — only new serena_ui content is added
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 29-42 preserve: the naming convention ('Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.'), the serena_backend example (mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol call), and the Limitations subsection ('`serena_backend`: rust-analyzer may take 30-60 seconds to index on first use'). No new serena_ui limitation was added since the user reported no known limitations (discovery-log line 65).

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing '## Bug Configuration' section with Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), and Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks) unchanged — the skill reports Bug Configuration is up to date
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 44-48: '- Bug issue type ID: 10001', '- Bug template: docs/bug-template.md', '- Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks'. discovery-log.md line 86: 'Result: Bug Configuration is up to date.'

assertion_results.text: The skill offers Security Configuration opt-in since the existing CLAUDE.md has no '## Security Configuration' section, and respects the user's decline — no Security Configuration section appears in the output
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 90-94: '`## Security Configuration` does not exist in the current CLAUDE.md. Asked the user whether to enable security triage for this project. User declined. Result: Security Configuration skipped (user declined).' claude-md-result.md contains no '## Security Configuration' section — the file ends after Bug Configuration at line 49.
